---
title: "Arkusz 15 вҖ” rozwiД…zania"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

**Zad. 1.**

```{r}
library(readr)
hur <- read_fwf(
  "data/ebtrk_atlc_1988_2015.txt",
  fwf_widths(
    c(7, 10, 6, 5, 5, 6, 4, 4, 4, 4, 5, 5, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4, 2, 6),
    c("storm_id", "storm_name", "date", "year", "lat", "lon",
      "wind_kts", "pressure",
      "ts_radius_NE", "ts_radius_SE", "ts_radius_SW", "ts_radius_NW",
      "r50_NE", "r50_SE", "r50_SW", "r50_NW",
      "r64_NE", "r64_SE", "r64_SW", "r64_NW",
      "r100_NE", "r100_SE", "r100_SW", "r100_NW",
      "ts_type", "distance")
  ),
  col_types = cols(.default = col_character())
)
dim(hur)   # 11824 Г— 26
length(unique(hur$storm_id))   # 377
```

**Odp.: 11 824 pomiarГіw, 377 unikalnych huraganГіw.**

**Zad. 2.**

```{r}
library(dplyr)

radius_cols <- c("ts_radius_NE","ts_radius_SE","ts_radius_SW","ts_radius_NW",
                 "r50_NE","r50_SE","r50_SW","r50_NW",
                 "r64_NE","r64_SE","r64_SW","r64_NW")

hur <- hur %>%
  mutate(
    wind_kts = as.numeric(wind_kts),
    year     = as.integer(year),
    lat      = as.numeric(lat),
    lon      = as.numeric(lon),
    across(all_of(radius_cols), ~ ifelse(as.numeric(.) == -99, NA, as.numeric(.)))
  )
```

**Zad. 3.**

```{r}
range(hur$year, na.rm = TRUE)   # 1988 2015

hur %>%
  count(year) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  slice(1:5)
```

**Odp.: Zakres 1988вҖ“2015. Lata o najwiДҷkszej aktywnoЕӣci: zwykle lata z duЕјД… liczbД… sezonГіw (np. 2005).**

**Zad. 4.**

```{r}
hur %>%
  filter(wind_kts == max(wind_kts, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  select(storm_name, year, wind_kts)
```

**Odp.: GILBERT, 1988, 160 wДҷzЕӮГіw.**

**Zad. 5.**

```{r}
hur_force <- sum(hur$wind_kts >= 64, na.rm = TRUE)   # 2984
hur_force
hur_force / nrow(hur) * 100   # ~25.2%
```

**Odp.: 2984 obserwacji (вүҲ25% wszystkich pomiarГіw) miaЕӮo siЕӮДҷ huraganu.**

**Zad. 6.**

```{r}
library(tidyr)

long <- hur %>%
  select(storm_id, storm_name, year, date, wind_kts, all_of(radius_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(radius_cols),
               names_to  = "quadrant",
               values_to = "radius") %>%
  filter(!is.na(radius), radius > 0)
```

**Zad. 7.**

```{r}
nrow(long)   # 27 635
```

**Odp.: 27 635 wierszy po odfiltrowaniu NA i wartoЕӣci вүӨ 0.**

**Zad. 8.**

```{r}
long %>%
  tidyr::separate(quadrant, into = c("threshold", "direction"), sep = "_(?=[A-Z]{2}$)") %>%
  filter(threshold == "r50") %>%
  group_by(direction) %>%
  summarise(mean_radius = mean(radius, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_radius))
```

**Odp.: NE zazwyczaj ma najwiДҷkszy promieЕ„ (prawa przednia ДҮwiartka jest najniebezpieczniejsza).**

**Zad. 9.**

```{r}
hur %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(max_wind = max(wind_kts, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(max_wind)) %>%
  slice(1)

# KtГіry huragan w tym roku?
hur %>%
  filter(year == 1988) %>%
  filter(wind_kts == max(wind_kts, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  select(storm_name, wind_kts, year)
```

**Odp.: Rok 1988 (GILBERT, 160 kt).**

**Zad. 10.**

```{r}
hur %>%
  group_by(storm_id, storm_name) %>%
  summarise(mean_wind = mean(wind_kts, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_wind)) %>%
  slice(1:3)
```

**Zad. 11.** вҶ’ **szerokoЕӣci (w znakach) kolejnych kolumn i ich nazwy.**

**Zad. 12.** вҶ’ **nazwy kolumn aвҖҰz stajД… siДҷ wartoЕӣciami w kolumnie `zmienna`.**

**Zad. 13.** вҶ’ **brak danych pomiarowych** (-99 to standardowy placeholder вҖһmissing" w tej bazie).

**Zad. 14.**

```{r}
hur %>%
  mutate(kategoria = case_when(
    wind_kts >= 137 ~ "Cat5",
    wind_kts >= 96  ~ "Cat3",
    wind_kts >= 64  ~ "Cat1",
    wind_kts >= 34  ~ "TS",
    TRUE            ~ "poniЕјej_TS"
  )) %>%
  count(kategoria) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))
```

**Odp.: WiДҷkszoЕӣДҮ to TS (34вҖ“63 kt); Cat1вҖ“Cat5 to ~25% obserwacji.**
